steps.title: Use the repeated expression
steps.content:
The target expression is just $10$ times the expression given in the equation:
$$80x+60=10(8x+6)$$

steps.title: Multiply the given value
steps.content:
Since $8x+6=46$, substitute that value into the target expression:
$$10(8x+6)=10(46)=460$$
The answer is D.
